raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad nu Dahwids mak- 
keniht no ta Augstuma 
biia pagahjs/ raugi/ 
tad fastappe wixxu Zihbus/ Me- 
wiboseta Sullainis ar weenu 
pahri apfrantu Ehsctu/ un us 
teem biia diwisints Maises/ ar 
fimts Rasina Bihteim/un fimts 
Pihteim no (zitteem) Waffa- 
ras Angkeem/ un weenu Ahdas 
Trauku ar Wihsu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch fazzija 
uhs Zihbu: Ko tu gribbi ar to? 
Tad fazzija Zihbus: Tee Ehscti 
irr preekfch ta Kehnina Nanna 
Jahfchanas pehz/ un ta Maise 
ar teem Waffarajeem preekfch 
teem Puifscheem ehft/ un tas 
Wihs/ ka tee Peekuufschi Tukf- 
uesi dserx.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas Kehninsch: 
Kur tad irr tawa Kunga Dehls? 
un Zihbus fazzija us to Kehni- 
n: Raugi/ wiꞥsch paleek Jeru- 
salemê/ jo wiꞥsch fazzija: Scho- 
deen atdohs man tas Israêta 
Nams manna Tehwa Walstibu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas Kehninsch 
us Zihbu: Raugf/ taws buhs 
wiꞥs/ kas Mewibosetam peederr. 
Un Zihbus fazzija: Es paklan- 
nohs/ lai es Schehlastibu atroh- 
mu preekfch tawahn Azzim/ 
mans Kungs Kehninsch.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu tas Kehninsch Dah- 
wids lihds Bakuriin nahze/redsi/ 
tad iggahje no turrenes weens 
Wihrs no Saula NaimmaRad- 
deim/ Simejus Wahrdn/ Ger- 
rus Dehls.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥsch gabje eedains un 
lahdedains/ un wiꞥsch mehtaja 
Dahwidu/ un wiꞥsch Kalpus ta 
Kehnina Dahwida ar Akmixeem/ 
jeischu wiꞥi Laudis un wiꞥi 
Warrence pa winna labbo un 
kreiso Rohku gahje.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Simejus fazzija ta lah- 
dedains: Eij ahra/eij ahra tu Af- 
tinu-Wihrs/ tu netiekis Zilweks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS irr lizzis us 
tew nahkt wiﬀasAffinis ta Nam- 
ma Saula/ kurra Weeta tu wal- 
dijs. Nu irr tas KUNGS to 
Walstibu tawam Dehlam Ab- 
saloman Rohka dewis. Un re- 
dsi/ tu efi tawa Nelainiba/ jo 
tu efi weens Affinu-Wihrs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Abisajus/ Ze- 
rujas Dehls us to Kehnins: Ka- 
pehz bij tchim nomirruscham 
Sunnammanu Kungu to Keh- 
nizu lahdeht? es no-eefchu jelle/ 
un noraufchu wiﬀam to Galwu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tas Kehninsch fazzi- 
ja: Kas man ar jums jadarra/ 
juhs Zerujas Dehli? jo lai wiꞥsch
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
